items.title: Ramadan 1447H Schedule Announcement
items.author: Mosque Committee
items.excerpt: The mosque committee is pleased to announce the schedule for Ramadan 1447H including tarawih prayers, iftar gatherings, and special programs throughout the holy month.

items.title: Sunday Islamic Study Circle
items.author: Education Committee
items.excerpt: Join us every Sunday morning for our weekly Islamic study circle. Open to all community members and students. Topics cover Quran, hadith, and daily Islamic practice.

items.title: Community Mosque Cleaning Day
items.author: Mosque Committee
items.excerpt: We invite all community members to join the monthly mosque cleaning and maintenance day. Together we keep our place of worship clean and welcoming for everyone.
